action: Reconcile canonical queue snapshots with later append-only team update records without overwriting canonical state.

progress.finding: The canonical queue is a bounded snapshot rather than a complete reconstruction of later team work; continuity readers must merge it with append-only queue-update records while preserving conflicts and source precedence.
progress.verification: Connector-backed source and blob cross-checks confirmed that ACTIVE_QUEUE.json omits R-007 while the committed R-007 update marks it completed; no canonical or peer-owned file was overwritten.
progress.privacy: Only public repository files, commit metadata, and abstracted project-state claims were included.

handoff: Implement a deterministic non-authoritative state projector that merges canonical snapshots with append-only deltas, rejects ownership violations, and preserves incompatible claims rather than selecting one silently.
